engine.label: Engine
engine.info_local: Runs entirely in your browser. No network required.
engine.info_api: Runs on the server — recommended for large simulations.

footer.authors: Sebastian Acevedo, Pablo Alvarez, Fernando Castillo, Angelo Guevara

about.title: About Titirilquen
about.lede: An educational transport simulator over a monocentric linear city, designed for university teaching at the School of Engineering (FCFM), University of Chile.

model_authors.heading: Original authorship
model_authors.body: The mathematical model — its supply, demand and equilibrium equations — and the original Streamlit version were developed by the following academic team:

web_impl.heading: Web rearchitecture
web_impl.body: This web interface re-implements the original simulator in React + FastAPI with a focus on pedagogical narrative. It preserves the numerical core intact and is fully interoperable with the Streamlit version.

license.heading: GPLv3
license.body: Both the original simulator and this re-implementation are distributed under the GNU General Public License v3. You are free to use, study, modify and redistribute the software under the same license.
